title: Bits & Tweaks LITE
description: An smaller collection of Texture/Model Tweaks that enhance the player's experience. Meant to be completed according to your own needs. | 1.8.9, 1.18.2, 1.19.4, 1.20.x, 1.21.x
body:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uzR340nG/images/79e5716f70dd21a58c48365ed23b2f75b8b3fe9b.png)
# About This edition of **ItsMemed's Bits & Tweaks** eliminates all content from Vanilla Tweaks and focuses on adding original content, therefore you can complete it towards your own needs. Being a collection of essential Texture/Model Tweaks made by various creators, bringing a familiar, yet different look to Vanilla Minecraft. This is the best I could do to compress this pack on my own while working on the original edition. Lots of **feedback** would be really appreciated :) **To download the *Full Edition*** [Click Here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bits-and-tweaks). # Features The number of features has been lowered to a rough estimate of **30 features**, not considering the numerous texture/model fixes.
Show Feature List - **Overhauled Textures for commonly used PvP and Survival related items** *(Armor, Tools, Weapons, Rods, Ender Crystals, Golden Apples, Resources, etc.)* - **Overhauled Dark/Transparent GUI** - **Brewing Guide** - **HD Minecraft Title** - **HD Shield Banner Patterns** - **HD Paintings** *(+Avatar Elemental Paintings)* - **Panoramas with Shaders** *(Different on each version of the game)* - **Distinct Axolotl Buckets** *(**CEM** Dependent)* - **Golden Apple Hunger Bar** *(+AppleSkin Compatible)* - **Hunger Preview** *(+AppleSkin Compatible)* - **Alternate Ore Textures** *(**1.8.9** Exclusive)* - **Alternate Wool Textures** *(**1.8.9** Exclusive, +Lunar Client Compatible)* - **Alternate Leather Horse Armor** - **Alternate Potion, Critical Damage and Enchanted Damage Particles** - **Font Textures** *(30% Completion)* - **Lower and Smaller Shields** - **Cooler Enderman and Ender Dragon Textures** - **Emissive Drowned** *(**CEM** Dependent)* - **Connected Bookshelves** *(**CEM** Dependent, **1.8.9** Exclusive)* - **"Technoblade Never Dies!" Splash Text on all Game Versions** - **Variated Wolves Backport** *(**CEM** Dependent)* - **Variated Cows, Chicken and Pigs Backport** *(**CEM** Dependent)* - **Larger Wolf Collar** - **Cow and Mooshroom Model Backport** *(**CEM** Dependent)* - **Vex Rework Backport** *(**CEM** Dependent)* - **Bat Rework Backport** *(**CEM** Dependent)* - **Redstone Torch Model Backport** - **3D Mace** **+A bunch of Texture/Model Fixes and Updates, as well as some *Easter Eggs*.**
# Credits This is a list of some really **cool people** who either made a large part of the assets seen inside this Resource Pack, or helped with the testing of this Project.
Show Credits Creators - [NeraW](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/nera_w/) (Buckets+) - [fungiworm123](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/fungiform123/) (Avatar Elemental Paintings) `"Guess What? Chicken Butt!"` - [SmellyOne](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/smellyone/) (Report Button Fix) Testers and Cool people - [Splatus](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/splatus/) (Took some screenshots, including the main banner) `"100% silly"` - VeganLettuce123, likes anime girls and develops national cyber security threats.
___ ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uzR340nG/images/273bfd761f4925ac7679dcbe05c900e3e263a6c6.png) ___ Follow my socials! ➽[Twitch](https://www.twitch.tv/itsmemed_552) ➽[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/itsmemed_554/) ➽[Twitter](https://twitter.com/itsmemed_554) ➽[YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@itsmemed_552) ___ Alternate Download Link - [CurseForge download](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/bits-and-tweaks-lite) ___ [![](https://i.creativecommons.org/l/by-nc-sa/4.0/88x31.png)](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/) This work is licensed under a [Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-ShareAlike 4.0 International License](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/). - Feel free to include this resource pack in your mod pack or server. - If you wish to use this pack in any form of content, please credit with a link to the original PlanetMinecraft/Modrinth/CurseForge page where you can.
